{"code":"(def merged-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))
(def linear-ids (set (keep :closes_linear merged-prs)))
(def linear-states (linear_issues))
(def id->state (into {} (map (juxt :id :state) linear-states)))
(def bad-prs (filter #(and (:closes_linear %)
                           (not= "done" (get id->state (:closes_linear %))))
                     merged-prs))
